title: CamOverlay
description: Mod for camera control and different overlays
body:
# CamOverlay
Mod for camera control and various overlays
<hr>

[![alinlib](https://wf.kelcu.ru/kel-budges/alinlib/Requires.svg)](/mod/alinlib)

## What's that?
This mod was made for cool screenshots, and was inspired after one message in PWGood chat (Like that a player is willing to work as a photographer for free).

## Features
- Enabling different overlays
- Enabling auxiliary overlays
- Change world time
- Hiding hands
- Camera rotation
- Auto FOV change

## What overlays are there?
### CamikonShot
![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/iy9AZd9](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/iy9AZd9)

![https://wfu.kelcu.ru/YSehAsK](https://wfu.kelcu.ru/YSehAsK)
